title: Baaghi 3
tmdbOverview: A man embarks on a bloody rampage to save his kidnapped brother.
synopsis: Released in 2020, Baaghi 3 is a action, adventure and thriller film from India. It has a 2.3 rating on IMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 2020s and genre rankings. It carries a 12A certification (GB rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
